t.t: Submit and track home care service requests
List of accepted tasks with visit schedule

div.class: hc-page-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2

t.div: No requests have been submitted yet.
Provider rejected; request reassigned to other members.

t.p: Document upload is required to proceed to the next step.

div.label: Order / Purchased Service
div.p: To purchase a new service, buy the service product from the Shop first.

t.div: No invoices have been created for this request yet.

div.class: hc-page-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3

p.span: Your visit must fall within this time window.

form.onsubmit: return confirm('Are you sure you want to cancel this request?');

div.class: hc-page-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2

t.div: No accepted tasks with a scheduled visit time.
